items.name: Gold Cog Bladepack
items.description: For the royal guardsmen and the occasional Legacy Cogductor. These blades are considered among the most honored of weaponry to possess. They are the most durable variation along with their unique alterations courtesy of Gr. Cogny's Probability Engine. A mere twist of a gear and the future is made clear. One could say these blades have a mind of their own, willfully choosing to position themselves and their owners where they are needed most.
